summary: Iter 105 — Hospital shift-change workflow + Firm Master Policy Variant + Bank Sheet + bulk-import self-heal. Backend 13/13 pytest pass (shift-change gate, full lifecycle with duplicate 409 + approve-without-replacement 400 + swap + shift.allotted notifications + reject flow, PATCH policy variant partial + revert + full-blob regression). Frontend web (1920x900) verified: /shift-approvals loads with locked CCH firm showing Pending (1) + rich History; approve modal enforces replacement selection (Pressable disabled={!replacement}, opacity 0.55, testID sa-confirm-approve — code review); /firm-master auto-loads with locked Kankani firm — NO 'Pick a Firm' dead-end; section '10a. Attendance Policy Variant' shows both chips (testID fm-variant-policy_1/policy_2) and clicking Policy 2 then Policy 1 persists via API round-trip; Reports sidebar shows 'Bank Sheet Format'; /bank-sheet renders 17-employee table with Finance-Year/Month/Employee-Type/Pay-Mode filters; /employee-bulk-import 'Import under firm' dropdown lists Kankani Enterprises · KEPS AND City Care Hospital · CCH (not stuck on placeholder). Mobile (390x844) verified: Anita (Hospital) home dashboard shows row-shift-change quick action; /shift-change shows current shift 'Morning', 3 shift chips (Morning/Evening/Night) and 'My requests' history. Kankani employee visibility gate is confirmed at API level (GET options allowed:false, POST create 403). Regression: attendance policy full-blob PATCH still works.

issues: Non-blocking console warnings/errors persist from earlier iterations: 'shadow* deprecated', 'Invalid style property of outline/background', 'Image style.resizeMode deprecated', 'props.pointerEvents deprecated'. Cosmetic RN-Web migration.

action_items: None blocking. Optional cleanup: migrate deprecated RN-Web style props (shadow*, outline, background shorthand, style.resizeMode, style.pointerEvents) to silence console noise (carried forward from iter 100).
critical_code_review_comments: routes/shift_change.py is clean, single-purpose (~350 lines): hospital gate via _is_hospital_firm, before-punch guard via _has_punched, mandatory replacement on approve with 400 error, atomic user shift_name swap + shift_assignments insert + two shift.allotted notifications + optional email fire-and-forget. Good.
PolicyVariantPicker.tsx uses testID fm-variant-<key> — reliably targetable.
shift-approvals.tsx approve confirm Pressable is disabled={busy || !replacement} with opacity 0.55 — enforces the mandatory replacement UI contract that matches backend 400 gate.
seed_data_creation: During tests: 1 shift-change request approved (Anita Morning->Evening) and 2 rejected (iter105 reject, UI cleanup) on future dates (2026-07-18/07-20/08-01). Cleanup at end rejected any residual pending requests. Kankani attendance_policy variant left at policy_1 (verified via GET). Anita's shift_name is currently 'Morning' after the approve/restore cycle — consistent with pre-existing test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iter 105 features (hospital shift-change workflow, Policy 1/2 variant PATCH partial support, Bank Sheet Format under Reports sidebar, bulk-import firm-name dropdown self-heal) working end-to-end. Cloudflare 'Security check in progress' + HTTP 429 rate-limits appear on rapid mobile navigation — retry after a pause or split flows across separate playwright runs. Kankani non-hospital visibility gate was verified at API layer (backend test test_non_hospital_create_403 passes). Existing test data preserved (Anita/Rekha prior approved/rejected history intact).
